sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71892" key="o)a/risma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀᾰ´ρ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n71892.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">familiar converse,</tr_> in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
